mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in PAYEMS raises household income expectations and corporate revenue breadth, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the payroll trend strengthens.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2016-02-15 latest PAYEMS vintage was 143288 thousand for Jan 2016
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month PAYEMS growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day S&P 500 returns over two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of FEDFUNDS above its trailing 12-month high marks a tightening shock that raises discount rates and reduces equity risk appetite, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 12-month high
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2016-02-15 latest FEDFUNDS vintage was 0.34 for Jan 2016 after the first Fed liftoff
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered returns exceed the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE is below 5.0 and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months, the economy is late-cycle and policy tightening dominates labor strength, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2016-02-15 latest UNRATE vintage was 4.9 for Jan 2016
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not underperform periods with UNRATE below 5.0 and non-rising FEDFUNDS by at least 50 basis points over 20 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in INDPRO signals weakening manufacturing output and lower operating leverage for cyclical earnings, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls by more than 0.5% over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2016-02-15 latest INDPRO vintage was 106.0222 for Dec 2015
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO decline triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of cases and no drawdown clustering is observed.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS growth exceeds CPIAUCSL inflation over 3 months, real consumer spending is improving and near-term revenue expectations rise, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2016-02-15 latest RSAFS vintage was 449904 million for Jan 2016
failure_condition: Reject if the real retail sales trigger has average 5-day S&P 500 returns less than or equal to zero in at least 3 of 4 walk-forward subperiods.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of HOUST above its trailing 6-month average signals improving residential investment and future durable-goods demand, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its trailing 6-month average
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2016-02-15 latest HOUST vintage was 1149 thousand units for Dec 2015
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upside crossings fail to beat unconditional 60-day S&P 500 returns by at least 25 basis points on average after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is low and FEDFUNDS remains below 1%, real liquidity is supportive and discount-rate pressure is limited, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2016-02-15 latest CPIAUCSL vintage was 237.847 for Dec 2015
failure_condition: Reject if this joint low-inflation low-rate condition has a 20-day hit rate below the unconditional positive-return frequency by more than 5 percentage points.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of UNRATE more than 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 12-month low signals rising recession risk and deteriorating labor demand, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 12-month low
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2016-02-15 latest UNRATE vintage was 4.9 for Jan 2016
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE deterioration triggers are not followed by lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-trigger periods in at least 70% of walk-forward folds.
